# 🎙️ AI Powered Voice Detector
🔍 *Generative AI • Audio Analysis • Gemini API • React*

## 🚀 Tech Stack & Domains
![LLM](https://img.shields.io/badge/LLM-Gemini%203%20Flash-brightgreen)
![Frontend](https://img.shields.io/badge/UI-React-blue)
![AI](https://img.shields.io/badge/Domain-Generative%20AI-purple)
![Audio](https://img.shields.io/badge/Domain-Audio%20Analysis-orange)
![Security](https://img.shields.io/badge/Domain-AI%20Fraud%20Detection-navy)

---

## 📘 Overview
**AI Powered Voice Detector** is a system designed to detect whether an audio sample is generated by **AI or spoken by a real human**.

The project was developed during an **India AI Impact Summit Buildathon in HCL GUVI**, addressing the growing problem of **AI-generated scam calls**.

Users can upload or share audio files, and the system analyzes voice characteristics to determine authenticity.

---

## 🎯 Problem Statement
With the rapid growth of generative AI, scammers are using **AI-generated voice calls** to impersonate real people and commit fraud. These attacks are becoming harder to detect, especially for non-technical users.

There is a need for an intelligent system that can analyze audio signals and help identify whether a voice is **AI-generated or human**.

---

## 🎯 Project Objective
The goal of this project is to build an **AI-powered voice detection system** that:

- Accepts audio input in multiple formats  
- Analyzes voice patterns and characteristics  
- Determines whether the voice is AI-generated or human  
- Generates a detailed detection report  

Supported languages include:
- Tamil  
- English  
- Malayalam  
- Telugu  
- Kannada  

---

## 💼 Business Use Cases
| Use Case | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| 🏦 Banking Security | Detect AI-generated fraud calls targeting customers |
| 📡 Telecom Monitoring | Identify suspicious automated voice traffic |
| 💳 Financial Protection | Prevent voice-based social engineering attacks |
| 🚓 Cybercrime Investigation | Assist law enforcement in detecting AI voice scams |

---

## 🧠 What the System Does
The system analyzes audio characteristics such as:

- Voice fluency  
- Breathing patterns  
- Tone variation  
- Speech rhythm  

Using **Gemini API-based reasoning**, the system evaluates the audio and generates:

- **AI Voice or Human Voice classification**
- **Detection confidence percentage**
- **Detailed analysis report**

---

## 🗺️ Project Workflow

### 🧾 1 — Input Handling
The system accepts multiple input formats:
- MP3 audio
- MP4 audio/video
- Live recording
- URL links

---

### 🤖 2 — AI-Based Validation
- Gemini 3 Flash processes the input
- Extracts voice features
- Analyzes tone, fluency, and speech patterns

---

### 📊 3 — Evaluation Output
The system generates:
- **AI Voice or Human Voice classification**
- **Confidence score (0–100%)**
- **Detailed analysis report**

---

### 🌐 4 — UI Display
- React-based interface
- Displays results clearly with analysis details

## 🛠️ Installation & Execution

Clone repository:
```
git clone https://github.com/sarankumar74/
cd 
```

## Run Locally

**Prerequisites:**  Node.js


1. Install dependencies:
   `npm install`
2. Set the `GEMINI_API_KEY` in [.env.local](.env.local) to your Gemini API key
3. Run the app:
   `npm run dev`


Configure Gemini API key as required by the backend logic.


---

## 🔒 Notes
- Focused on **AI voice detection**
- Uses **Gemini API with structured system prompts**
- Designed to help identify AI-generated scam calls
